_meta.purpose: Stage 1 calibration set per docs/optcg-sim/card-effect-extraction-method.md. Ground-truth effectSpec for 50 hand-picked cards. Used by Stage 2 to measure Claude prompt accuracy. NOT loaded by the engine — engine reads shared/data/cards.json.
notes: Effects outside the current schema (e.g. 'rest DON to a leader' for ramp-to-leader, 'set as active', 'cannot be rested') are captured as comments in `_note` fields where the closest action approximates them. The interpreter will still run the closest action; mismatch is documented for Stage 2 to handle.

`give DON to leader/character` is modeled as `ramp` with `target: your_leader|your_character` even though the canonical ramp template adds to the cost area. The schema can be extended in V3.x if/when needed.

cards.name: Kouzuki Toki
cards.effect: If you have a [Kouzuki Oden] Character, this Character gains [Blocker].
cards._note: Conditional keyword grant — not yet modeled as an action. Vanilla fallback for now.

cards.name: Franky
cards.effect: [DON!! x1] This Character can also attack your opponent's active Characters.
cards._note: Conditional permission change — not modeled. Vanilla fallback.

cards.name: Daddy Masterson
cards.effect: [DON!! x1] [End of Your Turn] Set this Character as active.
cards._note: End-of-turn rest_target inversion — schema lacks 'set_active'. Vanilla fallback.

cards.name: Edward Weevil
cards.effect: [On Play] Draw 1 card.

cards.name: King
cards.effect: [On Play] Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Dracule Mihawk
cards.effect: [On Play] Draw 1 card.

cards.name: T-Bone
cards.effect: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

cards.name: Nami
cards.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type card other than [Nami] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Buggy
cards.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 red Event and add it to your hand.
cards._note: Type filter (Event) + color (red) — schema doesn't capture both. Falls back to plain peek.

cards.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
cards.effect: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {FILM} type card and add it to your hand.

cards.name: Nami
cards.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type card other than [Nami] and add it to your hand.

cards.name: Galaxy Wink
cards.effect: [Main] Up to 1 of your {Revolutionary Army} type Characters gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1000 power during this turn.
cards._note: Trait filter on power_buff target — schema doesn't model trait filter on your_character. Approximated.

cards.name: Sham
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {East Blue} type, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

cards.name: Uta
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Uta], draw 2 cards. Then, play up to 1 Character card with 6000 power or less and no base effect from your hand.
cards._note: Second clause is play_for_free with constraints not yet modeled; ground-truth captures the draw cleanly.

cards.name: Sugar
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Sugar], play up to 1 {Donquixote Pirates} type Character card with 6000 power or less from your hand rested.
cards._note: Conditional play_for_free with trait + power cap not yet modeled. Vanilla fallback.

cards.name: Kouzuki Hiyori
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Kouzuki Oden], draw 1 card. [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your {Land of Wano} type Leader.

cards.name: Igaram
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Nefeltari Vivi], draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand. [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
cards._note: Self-discard cost on draw 2 not modeled. Activate-main self-discard cost not modeled. Best-effort.

cards.name: Kin'emon
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Kouzuki Oden], play up to 1 {The Akazaya Nine} type Character card with a cost of 3 or less from your hand.
cards._note: Conditional play_for_free with trait + cost cap not yet modeled. Best-effort.

cards.name: Portgas.D.Ace
cards.effect: [On Play] Give up to 2 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn. Then, if your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains [Rush] during this turn.
cards._note: Power_buff −3000 ×2; second clause (conditional Rush this turn) is keyword-grant, not modeled. Best-effort first clause only.

cards.name: The Weak Do Not Have the Right...
cards.effect: [Main]/[Counter] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 6 or less.

cards.name: Toh-Toh
cards.effect: [On Play] Draw 1 card if your Leader has 0 power or less.
cards._note: if_leader_power_max condition isn't in schema. Closest approximation: always-draw — Leader power 0 is uncommon. Skipped for safety.

cards.name: Duplicate placeholder (skip)
cards._note: intentional dup avoided

cards.name: Brook
cards.effect: [On Play]/[When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 0.

cards.name: Arlong
cards.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Fish-Man} or {East Blue} type, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your Leader. Then, up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next turn.
cards._note: Second clause (cannot-be-rested lock) not modeled. First clause captured.

cards.name: Carrot
cards.effect: [On Play] If you have 3 or more DON!! cards on your field, look at 7 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Zou] and add it to your hand.

cards.name: Jewelry Bonney
cards.effect: [On Play] Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.
cards._note: Lock effect not modeled. Vanilla.

cards.name: Ms. All Sunday
cards.effect: [Blocker]. [On K.O.] If your Leader has the {Baroque Works} type, add up to 1 Event from your trash to your hand.

cards.name: Byrnndi World
cards.effect: [Activate: Main] DON!! −8: This Character gains +792000 power during this turn.
cards._note: DON-cost not modeled in spec yet; templateParams.donCost handles the cost separately. Magnitude is literally +792000 (one-shot kill button).

cards.name: Trueno Bastardo
cards.effect: [Main] Choose up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less and K.O. it. If you have 15 or more cards in your trash, choose up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less instead.

cards.name: Shirahoshi
cards.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character and place 2 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck: If your opponent has 6 or more cards in their hand, your opponent trashes 1 card from their hand.
cards._note: Cost (rest self + return 2 trash to deck bottom) not modeled. Condition + disruption captured.

cards.name: Four Thousand-Brick Fist
cards.effect: [Main] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 2000 power or less.
cards._note: Target filter 'with 2000 power or less' isn't modeled as cost — closest fallback uses cost_max as a proxy.

cards.name: Carrot
cards.effect: [Trigger] Play this card.
cards._note: Play-from-trigger isn't in schema; existing engine handles it via trigger_window phase. Vanilla here.

cards.name: Jozu
cards.effect: [DON!! x1] If you have 2 or less Life cards and your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", this Character gains [Rush].
cards._note: Conditional keyword grant not modeled. Vanilla.

cards.name: Thatch
cards.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] This Character gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, trash this Character at the end of this turn.
cards._note: Self-trash at end of turn not modeled; power_buff captured.

cards.name: Koza
cards.effect: [When Attacking] You may give your 1 active Leader −5000 power during this turn: This Character gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn.
cards._note: Optional cost (−5000 to own leader) not modeled. Captured as straight buff-self.

cards.name: Sarquiss
cards.effect: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your Characters with a cost of 3 or more: Set this Character as active.
cards._note: Set-self-active not modeled; closest: vanilla.

cards.name: Shuraiya
cards.effect: [Blocker]. [When Attacking]/[On Block] [Once Per Turn] This Character's base power becomes the same as your opponent's Leader.
cards._note: Match-power-to-opp-leader is a special set; not modeled. Vanilla.

cards.name: Just Shut Up and Come with Us!!!!
cards.effect: [Counter] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and play up to 1 {Animal} type Character card with a cost of 3 or less.
cards._note: Play-from-deck not modeled; falls back to peek + add (closest available).

cards.name: There's No Way You Could Defeat Me!!
cards.effect: [Counter] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 6000 base power or less.
cards._note: [Counter] doesn't map to a fireEffects trigger directly — that branch lives in playCounter inline in applyAction. Captured as on_play fallback for the [Main] / event-play path.

cards.name: Yamato
cards.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

cards.name: Mini-Merry
cards.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this card and place 1 of your Characters with 1000 base power at the bottom of your deck: Draw 1 card.
cards._note: Cost (rest stage + return your own char to deck) not modeled. Draw captured.

cards.name: Kouzuki Hiyori
cards.effect: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Play up to 1 {Land of Wano} type Character card with a cost of 5 or less other than [Kouzuki Hiyori] from your hand. Then, draw 1 card.
cards._note: Cost (self-trash) + play_for_free with filters not fully modeled. Draw captured.

cards.name: Radical Beam!!
cards.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, that card gains an additional +2000 power.
cards._note: [Counter] event — engine handles boost inline. Conditional bonus boost not modeled. Vanilla in spec form.
